name: spotify-pp-mcp
description: You can use Spotify's Web API to discover music and podcasts, manage your Spotify library, control audio playback

spotify_oauth_2_0.title: SPOTIFY_OAUTH_2_0
spotify_oauth_2_0.description: Sets SPOTIFY_OAUTH_2_0 for the Spotify Web MCP server. Get a credential from https://developer.spotify.com/documentation/general/guides/authorization-guide/.

spotify_playlist_id.title: SPOTIFY_PLAYLIST_ID
spotify_playlist_id.description: Sets SPOTIFY_PLAYLIST_ID for the endpoint template variable {playlist_id}.

spotify_user_id.title: SPOTIFY_USER_ID
spotify_user_id.description: Sets SPOTIFY_USER_ID for the endpoint template variable {user_id}.
